title: FetchXRates Public API
description: Public API for exchange rates, statistics, and currency conversion. Rates are sourced from central banks including ECB, BOE, RBA, and the US Federal Reserve. All dates use YYYY-MM-DD format.

headers.x-email: The email address associated with your API key

authentication.notes: Obtain an API key from the FetchXRates dashboard after subscribing. Both headers must be present on every request except /healthcheck and /docs.

dateParameters.description: Most endpoints accept flexible date input. Priority: start+end > date > lookbackDays > default (today only).

options.description: Inclusive date range in YYYY-MM-DD format.
Number of calendar days to look back from today (e.g. 7, 30, 90).
Defaults to today only (latest available date).

endpoints.description: Returns an array of all supported ISO 4217 currencies with their code and display name.

errorResponses.description: Missing or invalid x-api-key or x-email header.
Feature not available on your current plan.
Monthly request limit exceeded.

endpoints.description: Returns base currencies for which historical rate data is available, as an array of { code, name } objects.

errorResponses.description: Missing or invalid x-api-key or x-email header.
Feature not available on your current plan.
Monthly request limit exceeded.

endpoints.description: Returns exchange rates for a base currency. When no date parameters are given, returns today's rates only. Accepts flexible date input (see dateParameters).

parameters.name: base
parameters.description: ISO 4217 base currency code (e.g. AUD, USD, EUR).

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Range start date (inclusive). Must be paired with end.

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: Range end date (inclusive). Must be paired with start.

parameters.name: lookbackDays
parameters.description: Number of calendar days to look back from today.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: JSON array or comma-separated list of target currency codes. Omit for all currencies.

errorResponses.description: Missing required query parameter: base.
Missing or invalid x-api-key or x-email header.
Feature not available on your current plan.
No rate data found for the given base currency.
Monthly request limit exceeded.
Internal error reading rate data from storage.

endpoints.summary: Exchange rates over a date range
endpoints.description: Returns daily exchange rates for the specified target currencies. `to` is required. Same flexible date input as /publication. When no date parameters are given, returns today's rates only.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: ISO 4217 source currency code (e.g. AUD, USD, EUR).

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Range start date (inclusive). Must be paired with end.

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: Range end date (inclusive). Must be paired with start.

parameters.name: lookbackDays
parameters.description: Number of calendar days to look back from today.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: JSON array or comma-separated list of target currency codes. Required.

errorResponses.description: Missing required query parameter: from.
Missing required query parameter: to.
Missing or invalid x-api-key or x-email header.
Feature not available on your current plan.
Monthly request limit exceeded.
Internal error reading rate data from storage.

endpoints.summary: Rate statistics over a date range
endpoints.description: Computes min, max, average, median, standard deviation and data-point count for each target currency over the resolved date range. Accepts the same flexible date parameters as /rates.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: ISO 4217 source currency code (e.g. AUD, USD, EUR).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: JSON array or comma-separated list of target currency codes.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Range start date (inclusive). Must be paired with end.

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: Range end date (inclusive). Must be paired with start.

parameters.name: lookbackDays
parameters.description: Number of calendar days to look back from today.

errorResponses.description: Missing required query parameter: from.
Missing required query parameter: to.
Missing or invalid x-api-key or x-email header.
Feature not available on your current plan.
Monthly request limit exceeded.
Internal error computing statistics.

endpoints.description: Converts a specified amount from one currency to one or more target currencies on a given date. When date is omitted, today's rate is used.

errorResponses.description: Missing required fields: from, to, amount.
amount must be a number.
Missing or invalid x-api-key or x-email header.
Feature not available on your current plan.
Monthly request limit exceeded.
Internal error computing conversion rate.

endpoints.description: Converts date-specific amounts from one source currency to one or more target currencies. The amounts object maps each YYYY-MM-DD date to the amount to convert on that date.

amounts.description: Map of YYYY-MM-DD date strings to the amount to convert on that date.

errorResponses.description: Missing or invalid fields: from, to, amounts.
amounts must contain at least one date entry.
Missing or invalid x-api-key or x-email header.
Feature not available on your current plan.
Monthly request limit exceeded.
Internal error computing conversion rates.

endpoints.description: Returns metadata about the exchange rate data sources used by FetchXRates.

body.name: European Central Bank
body.description: Daily foreign exchange reference rates published by the European Central Bank.

errorResponses.description: Missing or invalid x-api-key or x-email header.
Feature not available on your current plan.
Monthly request limit exceeded.

endpoints.description: Returns this documentation object — the full API catalogue.
Lightweight liveness probe. Returns HTTP 200 with a status and current server timestamp.

rateDataNotes.dataSources: Rates are sourced from multiple central banks including ECB (EUR), BOE (GBP), RBA (AUD), and the US Federal Reserve (USD).
rateDataNotes.weekendsAndHolidays: Rates are not published on weekends or public holidays. Endpoints automatically use the nearest available prior date when needed.
rateDataNotes.precision: Rates are returned with up to 4 decimal places. Statistics use up to 6 decimal places.
rateDataNotes.crossRates: When the requested base currency differs from the stored base, cross-rates are computed dynamically using standard FX conversion formulas.
rateDataNotes.dateFormat: All dates in requests and responses use the YYYY-MM-DD format (ISO 8601 date).
